zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Perot Latimer於1408年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Sir William Latimer22歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Wolverstone18歲。他和Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge至少有6個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1477年在英國英格蘭素福爾可武爾福斯東享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Perot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Antoine, Philippe, Remy.
French (Pérot): from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrow .
Altered form of French   Perret  , a cognate of 1 above.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Perot Latimer was born in 1408, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Latimer, was 22 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Wolverstone, was 18. He had at least 6 sons and 6 daughters with Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge. He died in 1477, in Woolverstone, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Perot Latimer est né en 1408, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Latimer, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Wolverstone, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles avec Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge. Il est décédé en 1477, à Woolverstone, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Perot Latimer(이)가 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Latimer(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Wolverstone(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Lady Anne Huffer Bokinge(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 보버스톤에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.
